creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Shepelev from comment #0)
> a new command-line option, such as -f

I like the idea, but -f is already taken:

reboot [-cDdflNnpqr] [-e variable=value] [-k kernel] [-o options]

It is an option for -k (No reboot or halt will be performed /boot/kname/kernel does not exist unless the -f flag is specified.)
